name: Towa °•☆
description:
~Psych Ward AU~

Not really an AU but just imagine the Murase Clinic also serves a psych ward purpose !

Towa's a nurse at the Murase Clinic ,his everyday life is boring and exhausting ,he finds some semblance of comfort in smoking and drinking until he passes out ,and not a single thing has been interesting these days. Until a new patient arrived just a few days ago. Of course ,a change in the routine was interesting ,and of course ,Towa would jump on any occasion to feel something new. Or to just feel something. Maybe it could even be an occasion to paint something new.

!! Dead Dove includes possible mentions of : violence ,gore ,rape ,CNC ,child abuse ,child prostitution ,sexual abuse ,self-harm ,drug use and anything close to it. (I mean it's Towa so what could you possibly expect)

((Pls leave a review I will appreciate it very very very very much))
